ddls:
CREATE TABLE "people_groups" (
  "people_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each people group */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the people group */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the people group resides */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the people group */,
  "primary_language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the people group */,
  "primary_religion" TEXT /* Primary religion practiced by the people group */,
  "location_details" TEXT /* Detailed location information (e.g., latitude, longitude, region) */,
  "secondary_languages" TEXT /* Secondary languages spoken by the people group */,
  "secondary_religions" TEXT /* Secondary religions practiced by the people group */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic details (e.g., age distribution, gender ratio) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the people group record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("people_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_people_groups_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the country */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_scales" (
  "progress_scale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress scale */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the progress scale (e.g., 1 ●, 2 ●, 3 ●) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the progress scale */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for the progress scale */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Numerical weight to prioritize progress scales in sorting and filtering */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the progress scale record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scripture_status" (
  "scripture_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scripture status */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the scripture status (e.g., 2 Translation Started, 4 New Testament) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scripture status */,
  "year_started" INTEGER /* Year when the translation started */,
  "year_completed" INTEGER /* Year when the translation was completed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the scripture status record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scripture_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "people_group_progress" (
  "people_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the people group */,
  "progress_scale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the progress scale */,
  "scripture_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scripture status */,
  "percent_christian_adherent" REAL /* Estimated percentage of people group adhering to Christianity */,
  "percent_evangelical" REAL /* Estimated percentage of people group adhering to Evangelical Christianity */,
  "num_churches" INTEGER /* Number of churches in the people group */,
  "num_baptized_members" INTEGER /* Number of baptized members in the people group */,
  "num_believers" INTEGER /* Number of believers in the people group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the people group progress record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("people_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_people_group_progress_scripture_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("scripture_status_id") REFERENCES scripture_status ("scripture_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_people_group_progress_progress_scale_id FOREIGN KEY ("progress_scale_id") REFERENCES progress_scales ("progress_scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimate */,
  "people_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the people group */,
  "workers_needed" INTEGER /* Estimated number of workers needed to evangelize the people group */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the estimate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the estimate record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_estimates_people_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("people_group_id") REFERENCES people_groups ("people_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "people_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the people group being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the people group */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the people group was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_people_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("people_group_id") REFERENCES people_groups ("people_group_id")
)
